pages.title: Plushies!
pages.text: Some chests in the world may contain Player Plushies!$(br)Changing the skin of said plushie requires you to rename Player Plushie Rename Token on an anvil to desired player name, and then combining it in crafting table.$(br2)Sometimes the recipe may output wrong skin, in that case take out one of the ingredients and then put it back. Not my fault it works that way :(
